title: Remove useless conditional blocks
description: Conditional statements with constant true or false conditions are redundant and indicate potential logic errors. These useless conditionals can result from debugging code, unset values, or misunderstood logic that needs correction.
recommendation: Remove unconditional if statements or fix the underlying logic error.

noncompliant.description: Conditional statements with constant true/false values are redundant and often indicate debugging code or logic errors.

compliant.description: Removing constant conditionals and using proper configuration, feature flags, or environment variables creates cleaner, more maintainable code.

checks.message: Useless conditional with constant value - remove redundant condition or fix logic
